who: accounting firms processing 5–15 quarterly tax filings
offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 quarterly tax filings, manual preparation causes late submissions and penalties. We automate the preparation instead of manual tax preparation processes.
problem: Manual preparation of quarterly tax filings is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on tax workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface for data entry and export functionality for filing submissions on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
